C[pablo_abc: Do ou live in Toronto?
C[pablo_abc: Have you ever been in Argentina ? South America ?
C[jayy: I haven't visited south america, but I hope to some day.
C[pablo_abc: How did you learn to play go? At the university ? Go club ?
jayy: I read an article about it somewhere and I learned how to play it online. How about you?
C[pablo_abc: In a similar way... Long time ago I followed the very basic rules in a magazine and soon decided to go to the Go asociation here in Argentina to practice it...
C[pablo_abc: In my time, the internet wasn't born...
C[pablo_abc: Hi Javy... you are running out of time...that would be a pitty...
C[jayy: Sorry, I've been really busy lately
C[pablo_abc: Hi Jayy... again not much time for your move...
pablo_abc: Hello jayy, will you play? Practically no time left....It's a pitty
pablo_abc: I don't like to win a game in this way... Please, next time, tell me in advance if you don't have the intention of finishing the proposed game
C[Celebrir: Hi, have fun and a good game
Celebrir: That one blunder at the left T.T
jayy: I was going to pass
jayy: didnt think it would matter
Celebrir: it was a interesting game
jayy: so many close games on this site
C[ya: hi have a good game
C[ya: hi have a good game
C[pablo_abc: Hi jayy! We are playing again... Have a good game...
C[pablo_abc: Hi jayy! We are playing again... Have a good game...
C[pablo_abc: Are you a football fan jayy ?
C[pablo_abc: Here almost everyone is following the word football championship
C[pablo_abc: Where do you live in Canada ? Toronto ?
C[jayy: Yeah, I live near there
C[pablo_abc: And how did you learn this fabulous game ? At University, club ?
C[jayy: I was at the library and I was picking out manga at random and one of the books I took was hikaru no go. Go sounded interesting so I started playing
jayy: I'm starting university this year, hopefully I can found a club

C[pablo_abc: I´ve never watched the manga books neither the TV episodes, but I heard that in Japan they were a succeed to develop interest in go for new generations when they appeared many years ago... May be one day I can watch some of them... Wich University will you go ? Toronto, Montreal, Mc Gill ? Will you study Computer Science, Math, Engineering ?
C[jayy: I'm going to UOIT to study medical science with the hopes of eventually going into pharmacy
C[jayy: What do you do for a living?

C[pablo_abc: I studied computer science, and I in an small textil company taking care of the computers and the software... As I study Math and like to program, I also work as a free lance programmer when I have the opportunity. I write software such as technical libraries or anything that is asked me to do...
pablo_abc: Do you know something about programming ?
C[jayy: I took a programming class and it was fun but I don't like it enough to study it by itself
jayy: I'll probably take python as an elective
C[pablo_abc: I''m not sure I understand what you have choosen at University course..., those studies are a kind of laboratory technics ? I mean, something previous to pharmacy , are they ?
jayy: I'm studying in a program that prepares me to be a medical lab techologist
jayy: although the courses allow me to branch out later on in stuff like medicine,pharmacology.etc
C[pablo_abc: Oh I undestand better now
C[pablo_abc: Have to go... Argentina will play against Belgium ... see you
C[pablo_abc: Fortunately were are still on the road...
pablo_abc: Yes, they were lost in the field and Germany did everything perfect... I heard that may be some teams has steroids... What do you think ? Are there drug's controls aren't they ?
C[jayy: I'm assuming they take some sort of anti-doping tests
jayy: steroids i doubt, and in team sports they dont matter too much regardless
C[pablo_abc: Sorry, my english is not so good... what do you mean in your last phrase...
jayy: I was saying that even if they have steroids it wont matter too much
jayy: or not as much in solo sports like running.etc

C[pablo_abc: I undestand your point now... but as a team to run in the end better than your rival is very important to make a good attack and a good defense... even more if the best players run fresh in the end... Believe me that to be in better conditions is important in football...
jayy: In comparison it is less but still significant
C[pablo_abc: Hi jayy! in your picture the cowboy has a gun or he's fishing ?
C[jayy: It's a gun, he's a character from a popular video game called tf2
C[pablo_abc: Jayy, have you watched the final game ?
C[pablo_abc: It was a pitty for us...  Did you like it ?
C[jayy: Well it was better than the brazil trouncing
jayy: it's a shame, I was hoping messi would get his championship

C[pablo_abc: Our team was much better that Brazil's team... In my opinion it was a shame that the referee ignored the penalty of the german goalkeeper in the begining... Even though as the brazilian people say ""Tristeza não tem fim""
jayy: soccer is a difficult sport to referee
C[jayy: and it seems those decisions decided a lot of the results
C[jayy: perhaps they should bring in video replay
pablo_abc: It was a good game!!
jayy: I'm sure we'll meet again in another tournament :)
